title: CompetencySector
description: A Sector node — a field of application (e.g. sector:water, sector:energy, sector:finance). Connected to competencies via the 'applied_in' relation. Answers WHERE a competency is applied; independent of the WHAT taxonomy (competency-area.schema.json), so the same competency can be shown across sectors without duplication.

id.description: Sector identifier. Grammar: 'sector:' prefix + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-] (e.g. 'sector:water').

description.description: Optional longer description of the sector
